.tile {

  position: relative;
  padding: 0;
  border: 0;

  cursor: pointer;
}

.tile.is-visible {

.tile:focus {

.tile .product-image {

.tile .overlay {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
  transition: opacity 0.1s linear;
  opacity: 0;
}

.tile:focus .overlay,
.tile:hover .overlay {
  opacity: 1;
}

  font-size: 14px;

  font-weight: bold;
}

/* Quick view dialog */
.dialog {

  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);

}

  padding: 20px;
}

.dialog .overlay .close-button {

  top: 15px;
  right: 10px;
  background: none;
  border: 0;
  font-size: 18px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.dialog .overlay .title {

}

.dialog .overlay .ok-button {
  padding: 10px 15px;
  background: royalblue;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 5px;
  color: white;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.dialog .overlay .ok-button:focus {

<script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const container = document.querySelector('.scroll-container');
  const content = document.querySelector('.scroll-content');

  if (container && content) {
    const duplicateContent = content.cloneNode(true); // Clone the content for looping
    container.appendChild(duplicateContent); // Append the duplicate to the container

    let scrollSpeed = 1.5; // Speed in pixels per frame (adjust as needed)
    let scrollPosition = 0;
    let lastScrollTime = 0; // Time of the last scroll update

    // Throttle function to reduce the number of scroll updates
    function throttleScroll() {
      const now = Date.now();
      if (now - lastScrollTime > 30) { // Only update every 10ms
        lastScrollTime = now;
        scrollPosition += scrollSpeed;

        // Reset position when content scrolls past the end
        if (scrollPosition >= content.offsetWidth) {
          scrollPosition = 0;
        }

        // Apply the scroll position to the container
        container.scrollLeft = scrollPosition;
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(throttleScroll);
    }

    // Start scrolling
    throttleScroll();
  }
});
</script>

  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
// to open the modal by removing the displayNone
function openModal() {
  const modal = document.getElementById('languagePopup');
  const languageList = document.getElementById('languageList');

  // empty each time to prevent cache  
  languageList.innerHTML = '';

  // get the current lang list
  const existingLiElements = document.querySelectorAll('.lang_switcher_class li');

  // loops through existing, create elements and append the link and text
  existingLiElements.forEach((li) => {
    const link = document.createElement('a');
    link.href = li.querySelector('a').href;
    link.textContent = li.querySelector('a').textContent;
    const listItem = document.createElement('li');
    listItem.appendChild(link);
    languageList.appendChild(listItem);
  });

//removing the displayNone to show modal
  modal.classList.remove('displayNone');
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';

}
    

// add the displayNone class to hide modal
function closeModal() {
  const modal = document.getElementById('languagePopup');
  modal.classList.add('displayNone');
   document.body.style.overflow = '';
}
  
  // check if the click happened outside the modal 
    document.getElementById('languagePopup').addEventListener('click', function (event) {
  if (event.target === this) {
    closeModal();
  }
});

// event listener added to trigger modal
document.querySelector('.lang_switcher_class').addEventListener('click', openModal);
 document.querySelector('.header__language-switcher.header--element').addEventListener('click', openModal);

// event listener added to close modal
  document.getElementById('closeModal').addEventListener('click', closeModal);

});

</script>

<script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    var splideElement = document.querySelector('.splide');
    var currentIndex = 7; // Start with the last slide index (assuming 8 slides, 0-based index)

    if (splideElement) {
        var splideInstance = new Splide(splideElement, {
            type: 'loop',
            perPage: 4,
            perMove: 1,
            arrows: true,
            dots: true,
            pagination: true,
            drag: true, // Enable drag on both desktop and mobile
            swipe: true, // Enable touch swiping
            breakpoints: {
                1024: {
                    perPage: 3,
                    arrows: true,
                },
                768: {
                    perPage: 2,
                    arrows: false, // Disable arrows on smaller screens
                },
                480: {
                    perPage: 2,
                    arrows: false,
                },
               393: {
                    perPage: 2,
                    arrows: false,
                },
            },
        });

        splideInstance.on('mounted move', function () {
            updateBoxShadow();
        });

        // Mount Splide and ensure shadow is updated
        splideInstance.mount();
        setTimeout(updateBoxShadow, 50);

        var nextButton = document.querySelector('.splide__arrow--next');
        var prevButton = document.querySelector('.splide__arrow--prev');

        // Function to update box shadows based on the current index
        function updateBoxShadow() {
            // Apply box shadow to all slides
            document.querySelectorAll('.splide__slide').forEach(function (slide) {
                slide.style.boxShadow = '0 2px 10px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, .08)';
            });

            // Remove box shadow from the slide based on current index
            var slideToHide = document.querySelector(`#splide01-slide0${currentIndex + 1}`);
            if (slideToHide) {
                slideToHide.style.boxShadow = 'none';
            }
        }

        // Next button click event
        if (nextButton) {
            nextButton.addEventListener('click', function () {
                // Move to the next slide in a looping manner
                currentIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % 8; // Loop around after reaching the last slide
                updateBoxShadow();
              prevButton.classList.remove('disabled');
            });
        }

        // Prev button click event
        if (prevButton) {
            prevButton.addEventListener('click', function () {
                // Move to the previous slide in a looping manner
                currentIndex = (currentIndex - 1 + 8) % 8; // Loop around after reaching the first slide
                updateBoxShadow();
            });
        }
    }
});
</script>
